# jupiterone_control_test (Resource)

A control test containing J1QL queries that evaluate control compliance.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `control_id` (String) The ID of the control this test belongs to
- `name` (String) The name of the control test
- `queries` (Attributes List) List of J1QL queries that make up this control test (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--queries))

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the control test

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--queries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `queries`

Required:

- `name` (String) The name of the query
- `query` (String) The J1QL query to evaluate
- `results_are` (String) Whether query results indicate GOOD or BAD compliance

Optional:

- `description` (String) Description of what this query tests
